mapper.sql: DBName, Tblname, ColName, ItemNo, BePK, BeIdentity, DataType, DataLength, BeNull, DefaultValue, Remark, UpdTime, DecimalLength, ColDes
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.TableStructure
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.TableStructure (DBName, Tblname, ColName, ItemNo, BePK, BeIdentity, DataType, DataLength, BeNull, DefaultValue, Remark, UpdTime, DecimalLength, ColDes) values (#{dbname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{colname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{bepk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{beidentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{datatype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{datalength,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{benull,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{defaultvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{decimallength,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{coldes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

insert into dbo.TableStructure
DBName,
Tblname,
ColName,
ItemNo,
BePK,
BeIdentity,
DataType,
DataLength,
BeNull,
DefaultValue,
Remark,
UpdTime,
DecimalLength,
ColDes,
#{dbname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{tblname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{colname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{itemno,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
#{bepk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{beidentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{datatype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{datalength,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
#{benull,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{defaultvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{remark,jdbcType=OTHER},
#{updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{decimallength,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{coldes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.TableStructure
DBName = #{record.dbname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Tblname = #{record.tblname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ColName = #{record.colname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ItemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
BePK = #{record.bepk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BeIdentity = #{record.beidentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DataType = #{record.datatype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DataLength = #{record.datalength,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
BeNull = #{record.benull,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DefaultValue = #{record.defaultvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=OTHER},
UpdTime = #{record.updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DecimalLength = #{record.decimallength,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ColDes = #{record.coldes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.TableStructure set DBName = #{record.dbname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Tblname = #{record.tblname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ColName = #{record.colname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ItemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, BePK = #{record.bepk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BeIdentity = #{record.beidentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DataType = #{record.datatype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DataLength = #{record.datalength,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, BeNull = #{record.benull,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DefaultValue = #{record.defaultvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=OTHER}, UpdTime = #{record.updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DecimalLength = #{record.decimallength,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ColDes = #{record.coldes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update dbo.TableStructure
ItemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
BePK = #{bepk,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BeIdentity = #{beidentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DataType = #{datatype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
DataLength = #{datalength,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
BeNull = #{benull,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DefaultValue = #{defaultvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=OTHER},
UpdTime = #{updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DecimalLength = #{decimallength,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ColDes = #{coldes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where DBName = #{dbname,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and Tblname = #{tblname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and ColName = #{colname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update dbo.TableStructure set ItemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, BePK = #{bepk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BeIdentity = #{beidentity,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DataType = #{datatype,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, DataLength = #{datalength,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, BeNull = #{benull,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DefaultValue = #{defaultvalue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=OTHER}, UpdTime = #{updtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, DecimalLength = #{decimallength,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ColDes = #{coldes,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where DBName = #{dbname,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and Tblname = #{tblname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} and ColName = #{colname,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}
